name_romaji: Hannyain Eisen Kujaku Myōō Kyō Shuppan Kinenhi (tō)
name_en: Monument Commemorating Hannyain Eisen's Publication of the Peacock King Sutra (and Others)
description_en: A monument (historic site), a stone monument commemorating the publication of the Peacock King (Kujaku Myōō) Sutra by Hannyain Eisen, among others. Municipally designated by Kitaakita, Akita, on 1978-02-01. Located in Takanosu.
